op.text: Training for Lakefront Marathon in October 2025; signed up 2025-02-24. Running four times per week with long run every Saturday morning. Did eight miles on Saturday 2025-02-22 along the river. Has been a casual runner for years (5Ks, one half marathon about four years ago). Chose marathon as 'something with a long arc' that's just theirs during difficult winter.
On 2025-02-24, Dana said of signing up for the marathon: 'It's the first time since mom that I've been excited about something in the future instead of dreading it.'
